sections.paragraph:
fut. יֵקַד Isa 10:16, and יִיקַד Deu 32:22, to burn, to set on fire, Isa 65:5 (Arab. وقد id., Syr. ܝܘܝܕ). Part. pass. יָקוּד “that which is kindled,” i.e. the fuel burning on the hearth, Isa 30:14.

Hophal הוּקַד to be kindled, to burn, Lev 6:2, , trop. of anger, Jer 15:14 17:4 .

Derivatives, יְקֹור, מֹוקֵר.
